title: MOBILE SHOWERS AND HYGIENE - 211info
text: CULTIVATE INITIATIVES AT LENTS WELLNESS FAIR MOBILE SHOWERS AND HYGIENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile van for showers, clothing, haircuts, hygiene products, health education, and provider referrals. Some services are conducted by nursing students and depend on volunteers. 4244 SE 91st Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 11am-2pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 17, TriMet MAX Green Line at Holgate Station Services: General Clothing Provision Hair and Nail Care Mobile Health Care Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
